idea-plugin.name: Project Quick Notes
idea-plugin.description:
Project Quick Notes

Project Quick Notes adds a lightweight note panel to IntelliJ IDEA, letting you keep short, project-specific notes directly inside the IDE.

Use it to record project startup commands, local service URLs, temporary TODOs, debugging context, test accounts, review reminders, or handoff notes without switching to another app.

How to use

  • Open a project in IntelliJ IDEA.
  • Open the Project Notes tool window from the left tool window bar.
  • Write your notes in the editor area.
  • Click Save Note to save notes for the current project.
  • Click Clear to remove the current project's note.

Features

  • Stores notes separately for each project.
  • Keeps useful project context inside the IDE.
  • Provides a simple tool window with save and clear actions.
  • Works without external services or accounts.

中文说明

Project Quick Notes 是一个轻量级 IntelliJ IDEA 项目便签插件。它会在 IDE 左侧添加 Project Notes 工具窗口，用来保存当前项目专属的简短笔记。

你可以用它记录项目启动命令、本地接口地址、测试账号、临时 TODO、问题排查结论、 Code Review 提醒或交接说明。不同项目的笔记会分开保存，互不影响。
